inputs.label: Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: The initial cost to acquire the NFT, including any minting or purchase expenses.

businessContext_i18n.en: The initial cost to acquire the NFT, including any minting or purchase expenses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: NFT'yi edinme maliyeti, basma veya satın alma giderleri dahil.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anschaffungskosten des NFT, einschließlich Minting- oder Kaufkosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût initial d'acquisition du NFT, y compris les frais de frappe ou d'achat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo inicial para adquirir el NFT, incluyendo gastos de acuñación o compra.

inputs.label: Gas Fee
inputs.businessContext: Transaction fee paid for minting or transferring the NFT on the blockchain.

businessContext_i18n.en: Transaction fee paid for minting or transferring the NFT on the blockchain.
businessContext_i18n.tr: NFT'yi blok zincirinde basma veya transfer etme için ödenen işlem ücreti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Transaktionsgebühr für das Minting oder den Transfer des NFT auf der Blockchain.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais de transaction payés pour la frappe ou le transfert du NFT sur la blockchain.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa de transacción pagada por acuñar o transferir el NFT en la blockchain.

inputs.label: Listing Fee
inputs.businessContext: Fee charged by the marketplace for listing the NFT for sale.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fee charged by the marketplace for listing the NFT for sale.
businessContext_i18n.tr: NFT'yi satışa sunmak için pazar yeri tarafından alınan ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gebühr des Marktplatzes für die Listung des NFT zum Verkauf.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais facturés par la plateforme pour mettre le NFT en vente.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa cobrada por el mercado por listar el NFT para la venta.

inputs.label: Estimated Sale Price
inputs.businessContext: The expected price at which the NFT will be sold on the secondary market.

businessContext_i18n.en: The expected price at which the NFT will be sold on the secondary market.
businessContext_i18n.tr: NFT'nin ikincil piyasada satılması beklenen fiyat.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Preis, zu dem das NFT auf dem Sekundärmarkt verkauft wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix attendu auquel le NFT sera vendu sur le marché secondaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio esperado al que se venderá el NFT en el mercado secundario.

inputs.label: Royalty Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of the sale price paid to the original creator as a royalty.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of the sale price paid to the original creator as a royalty.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Orijinal yaratıcıya telif olarak ödenen satış fiyatının yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Verkaufspreises, der als Lizenzgebühr an den ursprünglichen Ersteller gezahlt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du prix de vente versé au créateur original à titre de redevance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del precio de venta pagado al creador original como regalía.

formulas.roiPercent: ((salePrice - (purchasePrice + gasFee + listingFee + (salePrice * royaltyPercent / 100))) / (purchasePrice + gasFee + listingFee + (salePrice * royaltyPercent / 100))) * 100

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
